text: Donald Trump loves winning. His tariff plan was built on that promise. Trump's trade war is making everyone lose, and the stock market is the biggest loser of all. So, if you are an investor, this is a tricky time to make bets. Be very careful. No one knows how this trade war will shape up. There is significant risk both in the short and the long term. The IMF does not want a protracted war. A global recession cannot be ruled out this year. Look at what J.P. Morgan is saying. It is the biggest American bank. It has raised the odds of a global recession to 60%. This is Donald Trump's gift to the world.
